patterns_discovered: Consistent error handling pattern with try-catch blocks
Specific error message generation for different database scenarios
Console logging for database errors before throwing user-friendly errors
Ownership and authorization checks before database operations
Mapping of database results to GraphQL response format
gotchas_discovered: Potential unique constraint violations in brand creation/update
Foreign key constraint issues during brand deletion
Need to handle database operation errors without exposing internal details
Importance of preserving authorization checks in error handling

error_handling_improvements: Differentiated error handling for known vs unknown errors

recommendations: Consider creating a centralized error handling utility for GraphQL resolvers
Implement more granular error types for different database scenarios
Add comprehensive logging for better debugging
Consider adding transaction support for complex database operations
Create a standardized approach to map database errors to GraphQL errors
